boundary: Goal1125 is a prioritization audit only. It does not edit public wording, authorize speedup claims, start cloud resources, or release v1.0.

warnings: RTX phase is shorter than 10 ms; public wording needs larger-scale repeat evidence.

rows.next_local_action: Decide whether the 64M RTX versus 36M Embree normalized comparison is acceptable. If not, prepare a same-scale Embree/native baseline contract before the next pod.
rows.why: Goal1121 gives a real RT-core prepared pose-flag path above the timing floor, but Goal1123 intentionally blocked public wording until a same-scale or explicitly accepted normalized baseline review exists.
